# Support

Thanks for using cursor-rebind.

## Self-help

1. [README](../README.md) — install, rename migrate, prefix vs exact  
2. [Machine move guide](../docs/machine-move.md) — backup/restore for new machines and OS installs  
3. `cursor-rebind doctor <path>` and `cursor-rebind verify <path>` after a migrate  
4. `cursor-rebind restore --list` if a write went wrong on this machine  

## Asking for help

- Open a [bug report](https://github.com/Interittus13/cursor-rebind/issues/new?template=bug_report.yml) or [feature request](https://github.com/Interittus13/cursor-rebind/issues/new?template=feature_request.yml).
- Include OS, `cursor-rebind version`, exact commands, and whether **IDE** and/or **Agents Window** failed.
- Do not paste private chat transcripts or upload real `state.vscdb` files unless a maintainer asks.

## Security

See [SECURITY.md](../SECURITY.md).
